question_text: Which of the properties hold for the adjacency matrix A of a simple undirected unweighted graph having n vertices?

options.A: The diagonal entries of A2 are the degrees of the vertices of the graph.
options.B: If the graph is connected, then none of the entries of An – 1 + In can be zero.
options.C: If the sum of all the elements of A is at most 2(n – 1), then the graph must be acyclic.
options.D: If there is at least a 1 in each of A’s rows and columns, then the graph must be
